recommendations.title: Diablo
recommendations.overview: A young civil war veteran is forced on a desperate journey to save his kidnapped wife.

recommendations.title: Stagecoach
recommendations.overview: A group of people traveling on a stagecoach find their journey complicated by the threat of Geronimo, and learn something about each other in the process.

recommendations.title: Street Fighter
recommendations.overview: Colonel Guile and various other martial arts heroes fight against the tyranny of dictator M. Bison and his cohorts.

recommendations.title: Maverick
recommendations.overview: Bret Maverick is a gambler who would rather con someone than fight them, and needs an additional $3k in order to enter a winner-takes-all poker game beginning in a few days. He joins forces with a woman with a marvelous Southern accent, and the two t

recommendations.title: The Legend of Zorro
recommendations.overview: Despite trying to keep his swashbuckling to a minimum, a threat to California's pending statehood causes the adventure-loving Don Alejandro de la Vega and his wife, Elena, to take action.

recommendations.title: Blackthorn
recommendations.overview: In Bolivia, Butch Cassidy (now calling himself James Blackthorn) pines for one last sight of home, an adventure that aligns him with a young robber and makes the duo a target for gangs and lawmen alike.

recommendations.title: Juwanna Mann
recommendations.overview: A basketball star is booted out of the NBA when his on-court antics go too far, so he poses as a woman and joins the WUBA.

recommendations.title: Treasure of Silver Lake
recommendations.overview: Fred Engel's father is murdered by Colonel Brinkley in order to acquire a treasure map, however the Colonel only acquires half of it, the other half as held by Mrs. Butler. Discovering the scene of the crime, Old Shatterhand and Winnetou help Fred br

recommendations.title: Restraint
recommendations.overview: Two fugitives land in hot water when they take a hostage who poses a threat to their well-being.

recommendations.title: Samsara
recommendations.overview: A love story situated in the Himalayas. A Buddhist monk can't choose between life and the way of the Buddha.
